title: compatibility probe truthfulness

sources.reason: Current baseline and latest compatibility lanes.
Existing workflow contract tests and regression target.

riskAssessment.reason: A workflow that reuses fixed baseline jobs for latest probes can overstate support as hosted tools move.

executionDecision.reason: The workflow, static tests, and documentation boundaries are available locally.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm baseline pins are explicit, latest probes use distinct floating setup commands, and latest results cannot satisfy the blocking gate.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Blocking baseline versions are explicit and reproducible for Python, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Ubuntu, and macOS lanes.
compatibility-latest installs and runs distinct current ecosystem tools and is explicitly non-blocking.
Static workflow tests prove latest results cannot satisfy compatibility-gate.
Distribution and configuration docs distinguish verified baseline support from exploratory latest probes and hosted OS movement.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A pinned baseline lane runs the exact declared tool versions and remains blocking.
A latest probe uses distinct current tool setup and its failure is reported without satisfying the blocking gate.
Documentation warns that hosted Ubuntu/macOS labels move independently of the pinned baseline.

guidelines: Compatibility claims must match the commands and tool versions actually executed.
Latest ecosystem probes must not be used as blocking baseline evidence.

intent.problem: The compatibility workflow currently labels real-stack, extended-stack, and mobile jobs as latest probes while executing fixed tool versions, so the evidence cannot distinguish verified baseline support from current ecosystem movement.
constraints: Keep the fixed baseline blocking and reproducible.
Pin every baseline tool and document hosted Ubuntu/macOS movement as risk.
Do not change release publication or platform ownership settings.
intent.rationale: Separate reproducible baseline evidence from exploratory latest probes so release claims remain truthful without hiding ecosystem drift.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized the full PR and implementation cycle.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
